attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WPST.POSTRXLN_TO_SLSORDLN_THRD_KEY, 
WPST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,     
WPST.SK_UNIQUE_ID_INT,              
WPST.DSV_BOOKINGS_FLG,              
WPST.ACTIVE_FLG,                    
WPST.SRC_CREATED_DTM,               
WPST.DV_SRC_CREATED_DT,             
WPST.SRC_CREATED_PROCESS_NAME,      
WPST.SRC_UPDATED_DTM,               
WPST.DV_SRC_UPDATED_DT,             
WPST.SRC_UPDATED_PROCESS_NAME,      
WPST.SRC_RPTD_QUOTE_NUM,            
WPST.SRC_RPTD_CONTRACT_NUM,         
WPST.SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,        
WPST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,          
WPST.MATCHING_MTHD_FOR_TAGGING_NAME,
WPST.SRC_RPTD_ERP_SO_HEADER_ID,     
WPST.SRC_RPTD_ERP_QUOTE_HEADER_ID,  
WPST.SRC_RPTD_REVENUE_SRC_CD,       
WPST.SALES_MOTION_CD,               
WPST.SPLIT_PCT,                     
WPST.START_TV_DT,                   
WPST.END_TV_DT,                     
WPST.PO_EXISTS_FLG,                 
WPST.PO_DISTRI_EXISTS_FLG,          
WPST.PO_PRDT_EXISTS_FLG,            
WPST.QUOTE_EXISTS_FLG,              
WPST.QUOTE_DISTRI_EXISTS_FLG,       
WPST.QUOTE_PRDT_EXISTS_FLG,         
WPST.MULTIPLE_SALES_MOTION_FLG,     
WPST.LINKED_TO_MULTIPLE_SOL_FLG,    
WPST.SOFTWARE_OR_SERVICE_FLG,       
WPST.SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,        
WPST.ORIG_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,   
WPST.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,          
WPST.RU_REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
WPST.RU_SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,
WPST.RU_SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,    
WPST.RU_SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_REASON_DESC,
WPST.EDW_CREATE_DTM,                
WPST.EDW_CREATE_USER,               
WPST.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                
WPST.EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM
$$WORKDB.W_POSTRXLN_TO_SLSORDLN_THRD WPST
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POSTRXLN_TO_SLSORDLN_THRD_TV NPST
 WHERE WPST.POSTRXLN_TO_SLSORDLN_THRD_KEY=NPST.POSTRXLN_TO_SLSORDLN_THRD_KEY)
